slides.title: Skip *fat burners*
slides.body: They're caffeine pills with a big markup.

slides.title: Skip *BCAAs*
slides.body: Useless if you already eat enough protein.

slides.title: Skip *test boosters*
slides.body: They don't raise testosterone. Sleep does.

slides.title: Skip *mass gainers*
slides.body: It's just sugar. Eat real food instead.

slides.title: Keep it *simple*
slides.body: Protein, creatine, caffeine. That is it.

slides.title: Spend it on *food*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your protein and training on track for free.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
